mapper.sql: rq.ENTITY_ID RQ_ENTITY_ID, rq.REQUEST_ID RQ_REQUEST_ID, rq.ENTITY_CREATED_AT RQ_ENTITY_CREATED_AT, rq.CREATED_AT RQ_CREATED_AT
rs.REQUEST_ID RS_REQUEST_ID, rs.CREATED_AT RS_CREATED_AT, rs.BODY RS_BODY, rs.ENTITY_ID RS_ENTITY_ID, rs.ENTITY_CREATED_AT RS_ENTITY_CREATED_AT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REQUESTS ( REQUEST_ID, ENTITY_ID, CREATED_AT, ENTITY_CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{requestId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entityCreatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

INSERT INTO RESPONSES ( REQUEST_ID, CREATED_AT, BODY, ENTITY_ID, ENTITY_CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{requestId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{body, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entityCreatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM RESPONSES rs WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM REQUESTS rq WHERE sr.ENTITY_ID = #{searchSet.entityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND rq.REQUEST_ID = rs.REQUEST_ID AND rq.ENTITY_CREATED_AT >= date '${searchSet.partitionLowerBoundaryDate}' AND rq.ENTITY_CREATED_AT < date '${searchSet.partitionUpperBoundaryDate}' ) AND rs.ENTITY_CREATED_AT >= date '${searchSet.partitionLowerBoundaryDate}' AND rs.ENTITY_CREATED_AT < date '${searchSet.partitionUpperBoundaryDate}'

SELECT FROM REQUESTS rq WHERE rq.REQUEST_ID = #{requestId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND rq.ENTITY_CREATED_AT >= date '${searchSet.partitionLowerBoundaryDate}' AND rq.ENTITY_CREATED_AT < date '${searchSet.partitionUpperBoundaryDate}'
